title: Oil market gripped by record volatility and speculation since start of Middle East war
subhead: Brent crude and diesel prices have surged since the start of the US-Israeli military intervention in Iran. Behind the scenes, major trading firms and oil giants have monitored every move of oil tankers and watched closely for any drone attack.

title: War in Iran: At the G7, Canada and its partners want clarification from Washington
United States and Israel are facing the same Iranian foe but are fighting different wars
Baltic states fear Ukraine war could spill over onto their territory
subhead: Two Ukrainian drones launched against Russia accidentally landed in Estonia and Latvia. This incident comes as the scenario of a fictional pro-Russian republic, orchestrated by Moscow to justify a military intervention, spreads in the Baltic states.

title: French spirits giant Pernod Ricard in merger talks with Jack Daniel's owner
subhead: The discussions come as the alcohol sector faces a difficult global environment, with consumption falling among younger drinkers and new tariffs – particularly in the United States – hurting major producers. Pernod Ricard has been especially affected by US duties.

title: Napoleon's long-lost hat to go on display
subhead: Made by Poupard, Napoleon's official hatmaker, the headpiece displays all the hallmark features of an authentic imperial bicorne, including its distinctive proportions, a small tricolor cockade and a silk-taffeta lining. It will be exhibited at the Chateau de Chantilly, north of Paris, later in the year.

title: They were adopted and raised middle-class. France saw them as Black and Arab
subhead: Youssef Dridi and Eyob Bressy, both adopted and raised by families with significant cultural capital in the Paris region, share how, from adolescence, they experienced discrimination due to their skin color.

Regular exchanges between Hungarian and Russian foreign ministers spark scandal in Brussels
subhead: According to several media outlets, Péter Szijjarto was providing real-time updates to Sergey Lavrov on the content of discussions within the European Union's Foreign Affairs Council.

title: The serial-poisoning mother and daughter inspired by 'Breaking Bad'
subhead: Castor beans, wolfsbane, antifreeze, rat poison: Carole D. and Amélie D. considered every possible method to poison the former's partner, Enrique B. The two women are set to stand trial before a criminal court in western France starting March 25.

title: Emmanuel Grégoire's long run to Paris City Hall
subhead: The next mayor of Paris, who will be officially elected by the city council on Sunday, will now step into the spotlight after years in the shadow of his political mentors.
